pages.title: LUKA: WhatsApp Financial Assistant — Overview
pages.purpose: High-level introduction to LUKA, its purpose, architecture, and key concepts. Links to child pages for setup and core data flow.

pages.title: Getting Started & Configuration
pages.purpose: Step-by-step guide for local development setup, environment variable configuration, and running the application for the first time.

pages.title: End-to-End Request Flow
pages.purpose: Detailed walkthrough of how a WhatsApp message travels through the system: from Meta webhook ingestion, through LLM extraction, to database persistence and reply dispatch.

pages.title: Core Application Layer
pages.purpose: Overview of the FastAPI application, webhook handling, and outbound messaging. Links to child pages covering the webhook endpoints and the WhatsApp API client.

pages.title: FastAPI Application & Webhook Endpoints
pages.purpose: Detailed documentation of app/main.py: the FastAPI lifespan handler, Redis initialization, GET /webhook verification, POST /webhook event processing, and health-check endpoints.

pages.title: WhatsApp API Client
pages.purpose: Documentation of app/api/whatsapp.py: the send_whatsapp_message function, Meta Graph API v18.0 integration, Bearer token authentication, and Argentina phone-number normalization logic.

pages.title: LLM Service Layer
pages.purpose: Overview of how LUKA uses Large Language Models to extract structured expense data from natural language. Links to child pages covering the facade, provider abstraction, and concrete provider implementations.

pages.title: LLMService Facade
pages.purpose: Detailed documentation of app/services/llm.py: the LLMService class, process_text_expense pipeline, system instruction / literary-Spanish persona, JSON schema enforcement, amount validation, singleton provider lifecycle, and placeholder audio/image methods.

pages.title: LLM Provider Abstraction
pages.purpose: Documentation of the provider pattern: LLMProvider abstract base class (generate_json interface, _safe_json_loads utility), the create_provider factory function, and the _PROVIDERS registry in app/services/llm_providers/.

pages.title: Gemini & Mistral Provider Implementations
pages.purpose: Detailed documentation of GeminiProvider (app/services/llm_providers/gemini.py) and MistralProvider (app/services/llm_providers/mistral.py): API endpoints, model fallback lists, retry/backoff logic, response parsing, and environment variable requirements.

pages.title: Finance Service & Background Scheduler
pages.purpose: Overview of the financial business logic and background task system. Links to child pages covering the FinanceService and the APScheduler-based reminder system.

pages.title: Finance Service
pages.purpose: Documentation of app/services/finance.py: check_dynamic_budget (dynamic reallocation logic, Espiral de Culpa mitigation), generate_expense_chart (matplotlib pie-chart pipeline, BytesIO PNG output), and the stateless FinanceService design.

pages.title: Background Scheduler
pages.purpose: Documentation of app/scheduler.py: AsyncIOScheduler initialization via start_scheduler(), the check_reminders job (24-hour interval), WhatsApp template message dispatch, and integration with the FastAPI lifespan handler.

pages.title: Data Models & Persistence
pages.purpose: Documentation of the SQLAlchemy ORM schema in app/models/database.py: User, Expense, Budget, and Reminder models, the engine/SessionLocal setup, SQLite vs. PostgreSQL switching, and Supabase integration.

pages.title: Database Schema & ORM Models
pages.purpose: Detailed reference for each SQLAlchemy model: field definitions, foreign key relationships, nullable columns, UTC timestamping, and the is_active integer-boolean pattern used in Reminder.

pages.title: Database Configuration & Supabase Setup
pages.purpose: Guide to configuring DATABASE_URL for local SQLite and production PostgreSQL/Supabase, the psycopg3 driver adaptation, pool_pre_ping, check_same_thread, schema initialization commands, and PgBouncer recommendations.

pages.title: Testing
pages.purpose: Overview of the test suite structure and strategy. Links to child pages covering webhook tests, LLM service tests, and finance service tests.

pages.title: Webhook & API Tests
pages.purpose: Documentation of tests/test_webhook.py: FastAPI TestClient usage, GET /webhook hub-challenge verification tests, POST /webhook payload parsing tests, mocking of LLMService and send_whatsapp_message, and the WHATSAPP_VERIFY_TOKEN test fixture.

pages.title: LLM Service Tests
pages.purpose: Documentation of tests/test_llm.py: testing process_text_expense, mocking httpx.AsyncClient for Gemini and Mistral API responses, create_provider factory tests, _safe_json_loads edge cases, and error-handling assertions (RuntimeError, ValueError, JSONDecodeError).

pages.title: Finance Service Tests
pages.purpose: Documentation of tests/test_finance.py: check_dynamic_budget assertions, generate_expense_chart PNG validation (magic-byte check, non-empty bytes), and the test data categories (Comida, Transporte, Ocio).

pages.title: Deployment & Infrastructure
pages.purpose: Overview of how LUKA is containerized and deployed. Links to child pages covering the Dockerfile, Render configuration, and CI/CD pipeline.

pages.title: Docker Containerization
pages.purpose: Documentation of the Dockerfile: python:3.11-slim base image, layer-caching optimization for requirements.txt, PYTHONUNBUFFERED, gunicorn + UvicornWorker startup command, dynamic PORT binding, and the /home/app workdir.

pages.title: Render Deployment Guide
pages.purpose: Step-by-step guide for deploying to Render: Web Service vs. Background Worker choice, render.yaml IaC configuration, environment variable injection (DATABASE_URL, WHATSAPP_VERIFY_TOKEN), gunicorn worker count, and APScheduler persistence requirements.

pages.title: CI/CD Pipeline
pages.purpose: Documentation of .github/workflows/ci.yml: trigger conditions (push/PR to main), Python 3.11 environment setup with pip caching, ruff linting gate, pytest execution, and WHATSAPP_VERIFY_TOKEN injection for test isolation.

pages.title: Glossary
pages.purpose: Definitions of all codebase-specific terms, abbreviations, domain concepts, and Spanish-language identifiers that an onboarding engineer needs to know, with code pointers.
